ggsegChen 2.0.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Chen Thickness Cortical Atlas

Source: R/chen.R
chenTh.Rd

Genetic topography of brain thickness morphology with 12 cortical regions per hemisphere based on Chen et al. (2013).

chenTh()

Value

A [ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas] object (cortical).

References

Chen C-H, et al. (2013). Genetic topography of brain morphology. *PNAS*, 110(42), 17089-17094. doi:10.1073/pnas.1308091110

See also

Other ggseg_atlases: chenAr()

Examples

chenTh()
#> 
#> ── chenTh ggseg atlas ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 12
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: lateral, medial
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✖ ggseg3d (none)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 26 × 3
#>    hemi  region                                  label                          
#>    <chr> <chr>                                   <chr>                          
#>  1 left  temporal pole                           lh_temporal_pole               
#>  2 left  dorsolateral prefrontal                 lh_dorsolateral_prefrontal     
#>  3 left  motor-premotor-supplementary motor area lh_motor-premotor-supplementar…
#>  4 left  ventral frontal                         lh_ventral_frontal             
#>  5 left  occipital                               lh_occipital                   
#>  6 left  superior parietal                       lh_superior_parietal           
#>  7 left  medial temporal                         lh_medial_temporal             
#>  8 left  medial prefrontal                       lh_medial_prefrontal           
#>  9 left  middle temporal                         lh_middle_temporal             
#> 10 left  perisylvian                             lh_perisylvian                 
#> 11 left  inferior parietal                       lh_inferior_parietal           
#> 12 left  NA                                      lh_medial_wall                 
#> 13 left  ventromedial occipital                  lh_ventromedial_occipital      
#> 14 right dorsolateral prefrontal                 rh_dorsolateral_prefrontal     
#> 15 right temporal pole                           rh_temporal_pole               
#> 16 right motor-premotor-supplementary motor area rh_motor-premotor-supplementar…
#> 17 right ventral frontal                         rh_ventral_frontal             
#> 18 right occipital                               rh_occipital                   
#> 19 right superior parietal                       rh_superior_parietal           
#> 20 right medial temporal                         rh_medial_temporal             
#> 21 right perisylvian                             rh_perisylvian                 
#> 22 right middle temporal                         rh_middle_temporal             
#> 23 right inferior parietal                       rh_inferior_parietal           
#> 24 right NA                                      rh_medial_wall                 
#> 25 right medial prefrontal                       rh_medial_prefrontal           
#> 26 right ventromedial occipital                  rh_ventromedial_occipital
